recommendations.title: That Touch of Mink

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda

recommendations.title: Sex and Lucía
recommendations.overview: Various lives converge on an isolated island, all connected by an author whose novel has become inextricably entwined with his own life.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: The Devil All the Time
recommendations.overview: In Knockemstiff, Ohio and its neighboring backwoods, sinister characters converge around young Arvin Russell as he fights the evil forces that threaten him and his family.

recommendations.title: Dead End
recommendations.overview: The lives of a young man and woman, an infamous gangster and a group of street kids converge one day in a volatile New York City slum.
